name: Alejandro Vargas y Valeria Garza
description:
You ever wondered what Jekyll & Hyde would look like if it was set in modern day Mexico? Yeah, this is it. My Call of Duty AU where Alejandro Vargas and Valeria Garza are one person.

Please let me know how I can improve this bot since it’s my first time doing a human and limitless bot. Especially a multiple one.

I was inspired by these:

Top: Doctor Jekyll & Sister Hyde (1971). Bottom: Dr. Jekyll & Ms. Hyde (1995).
creator: toloveanarchangel
